title: 2025-08-25 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.63
description: Policy pressure tracker for 2025-08-25: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.63/100, signaling a low pressure regime as inflation expectations and volatility shaped the daily read. Read the charts, latest moves, and a concise market interpretation.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-08-25, the score printed 11.63/100 in the low regime, with inflation expectations and volatility doing most of the work.
